posts.text: I had created a thread on SKF Industrial but couldn’t post it as it didn’t meet forum standards and didn’t have bandwidth to clean it up. At 950 cr last quarter revenue (considering last Q as results are messed up due to de-merger . Mcap is still about 14k crores. Timken India with 1070 crore revenue in last quarter, mcap is at 27k crore. SKF industrial has huge capex of 6-800 crores for a new factory in Pune in next 2-3 years. SKF industrial will close the valuation gap with Timken. I will not be surprised to see a 50% upmove from current levels. Caution: It has seen sharp upmove of 30% alrea…
